summary: This is a promotional post for Gruber's annual Talk Show episode recorded remotely from WWDC 2021, featuring Apple executives Craig Federighi and Greg Joswiak. The post lists the topics covered including iPadOS 15 multitasking, on-device Siri, Safari and Mail privacy controls, and macOS Monterey. It serves primarily as a show notes page with sponsor acknowledgments and a credit to Sandwich for video production.
key_points: Gruber's annual WWDC Talk Show featured Apple SVPs Craig Federighi and Greg Joswiak as guests
Key WWDC 2021 topics discussed include iPadOS 15 multitasking, on-device Siri, privacy controls, and macOS Monterey
The episode was recorded remotely rather than as the traditional live event
money_quotes: Special guests Craig Federighi and Greg Joswiak join me to discuss the news from WWDC 2021.
key_insight: This is a brief show notes post for Gruber's flagship WWDC 2021 podcast episode featuring two of Apple's most senior executives, highlighting the major announcements of the conference.
